pi_items.source: Confirmed by setup_task.sh which places the file at this exact location.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh download URL and the README in the mommermi/geotiff_sample repository.
Confirmed by analyzing the downloaded TIFF file using the rasterio library, which reports 3 bands.
Confirmed by analyzing the downloaded TIFF file using the rasterio library, which reports an affine transformation resolution of (10.0, 10.0).

privileged_info_summary: The target GeoTIFF is sourced from Copernicus Sentinel-2A data hosted at github.com/mommermi/geotiff_sample, representing a real satellite image rather than synthetic data. Verification via the rasterio library confirms the file contains exactly 3 bands and has a spatial resolution of 10 meters. The environment properly provisions the file at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2a_sample.tif.
